texto: The virtue of angels is that they cannot deteriorate
autor: their flaw is that they cannot improve. Man's flaw is that he can deteriorate
explicacao: Citação de their flaw is that they cannot improve. Man's flaw is that he can deteriorate sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The virtue of angels is that they cannot deteriorate” articula reflexao, and-his-virtue-is-that-he-can-improve, virtue em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
